home.hero_desc: Get a clear view of what it’s worth — and whether it’s worth buying.
home.tip_joints_desc: Machine-cut vs hand-cut tells the era. Irregular is usually a good sign.
home.tip_glass_desc: Real age shows underneath, not on display surfaces.
home.tip_veneer_desc: Check the edges. Thick veneer (1-2mm) usually means pre-1850. Paper-thin is modern.
home.tip_hardware_desc: Look behind the handles. Extra holes suggest the hardware was replaced, affecting value.
home.tip_smell_desc: Old wood has a distinct, musty but not rotten smell. New stains smell like chemicals.

analysis.title: Professional Appraisal
analysis.price_guidance_desc: Prices like this usually reflect retail listings — real buying happens lower.
analysis.dealer_perspective_desc: Dealers will only buy this if the price leaves room for resale — otherwise it sits.
analysis.confidence_high_desc: Strong match across form, material, and market
analysis.provide_more_details: Add more details for a sharper valuation
analysis.overpaying_desc: This is where buyers go wrong
analysis.risk_increases: At this level, profit depends on condition and purchase price.
analysis.buy_strong: Strong Buy — priced well for the market
analysis.buy_risky: Risky — priced ahead of the market
analysis.buy_avoid: Avoid — overpriced for what it is
analysis.disclaimer: Based on observed market behaviour. A smart dealer always verifies in person before committing capital.

results.title: Curator's Findings
results.cant_find_it_desc: The market moves fast. Our network of auction houses and curators is on it. Set an alert and you'll be the first to know when it surfaces.

feedback_history.no_feedback_desc: Submit feedback to help refine our expert assessment.
feedback_history.share_hard_pass: Dealer Warning: This item is a Hard Pass (Score: {{score}}). {{judgement}}
feedback_history.share_tier_d: Antique Hunter Alert: This {{title}} is a Tier D utility item. {{judgement}}
feedback_history.investment_insight_fallback: The high restoration cost is the primary risk factor impacting your potential ROI.
feedback_history.must_have_insight_fallback: A great purchase for personal enjoyment. The condition is secondary to your aesthetic preference, but do budget for restoration.
feedback_history.resale_insight_fallback: The high restoration cost severely limits your margin. Proceed with caution.

paywall.title: Stop. This is where buyers overpay.
paywall.subtitle: At this stage, most people pay too much — because they don’t know what dealers know.
paywall.cta_footer: Instant access • No subscription • One-time unlock
paywall.value_reframe: Avoid overpaying by hundreds — or thousands — on a single purchase.
paywall.risk_reinforcement: Small differences in condition can change value significantly.
paywall.urgency_microcopy: Most users unlock before making an offer.
paywall.teaser_insight: Dealers would likely buy this below £450.
paywall.tension_line_title: ⚠️ Stop. This is where buyers overpay.
paywall.tension_line_subtitle: See the dealer's view before you commit capital
paywall.overpriced_warning: This category is often overpriced by inexperienced buyers
paywall.detail_warning: Small details will significantly impact price
paywall.low_value_notice: This is a Tier D utility item. No need to unlock — save your dealer view for higher-value finds.
paywall.value_anchor: This is typically a {{low}}–{{high}} item in real terms.
paywall.dealer_logic: Based on real dealer pricing behaviour
paywall.founder_note: Built by an active buyer — not just AI.

collection.title: Your Hunting Log
collection.delete_confirm: Are you sure you want to delete this find?

describe.title: Describe Your Find
describe.placeholder: e.g., A mahogany bureau with dovetail joints and original brass handles...
describe.location_placeholder: e.g. Paris Flea Market, London Shop
describe.not_supported: Voice input not supported in this browser
describe.hint_title: How to get the best result
describe.hint_step1: Upload clear images of your item.
describe.hint_footer: The more detail you give, the more decisive the valuation. Don't leave money on the table.
describe.try_item: Try an item — even something nearby
describe.upload_photo_hint: Most users just upload a photo — details are optional.
describe.simple_start_hint: “Start with something simple — even a glass or small item”

upload_choice.title: Before you buy — check this
upload_choice.desc: Most buyers overpay because they don't check the numbers first. Add details, or go straight to the expert assessment.
upload_choice.default_prompt: Assess this antique from the images provided.

settings.language_beta: Language support is in beta in some regions

feedback.thanks: Thank you, your feedback is much appreciated

reset_prompt.desc: You have an active valuation that hasn't been logged. Starting a new check will discard these details.
